description: Regression and evidence tasks derived from the PR #314-#320 Codex note retrospective audit. Converts 26 audit findings into structured remediation tasks for the AED batch autocoder. All tasks are mock-only in Wave 1.

1.description: Low-risk regression tests and documentation evidence tasks. Mock execution only.

2.description: Remaining regression tests for FIXED_ALREADY findings. Not yet populated.

tasks.finding_summary: task_id used directly in path construction without sanitization — vulnerable to path traversal
tasks.current_main_status: Fixed in commit e60e3b5 (PR #320). run_autocoder_batch.py line 377 now uses re.fullmatch(r'[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]{0,127}', task_id) before path use.

action.success_criteria: Test exists and PASSES in current main. Test would FAIL if the re.fullmatch sanitization is removed.
action.deliverable: New test function in tests/test_run_autocoder_batch.py that verifies task_id path traversal is rejected.

safety_notes: execution_mode must be 'unit' not 'mocked' for this task type
tasks.notes: Codex correctly identified a real P1 path traversal vulnerability. The fix (re.fullmatch) was added in e60e3b5. A regression test ensures it stays.

tasks.finding_summary: stop_on_first_hold consumed by Python truthiness — string 'false' would be truthy
tasks.current_main_status: Fixed in commit e60e3b5 (PR #320). run_autocoder_batch.py lines 489-494 now have isinstance(stop_on_first_hold_raw, bool) with explicit ValueError.

action.success_criteria: Test exists and PASSES in current main. Test would FAIL if the isinstance(bool) check is removed.
action.deliverable: New test function in tests/test_run_autocoder_batch.py that verifies stop_on_first_hold type enforcement.

safety_notes: execution_mode must be 'unit' not 'mocked' for this task type
tasks.notes: Codex correctly identified a type-safety bug. The isinstance(bool) check was added in e60e3b5. A regression test ensures it stays.

tasks.finding_summary: Eval runner logs batch_ok but reads batch_status.json regardless of subprocess rc — stale status consumed
tasks.current_main_status: Fixed in commit e60e3b5 (PR #320). run_autocoder_eval_corpus.py line 599 now exits immediately on non-zero rc: if rc != 0: return 1

action.success_criteria: Test exists and PASSES in current main. Test would FAIL if the 'if rc != 0: return 1' guard is removed.
action.deliverable: New test function in tests/test_run_autocoder_eval_corpus.py that verifies the eval runner exits on non-zero subprocess rc.

tasks.notes: Codex correctly identified that the eval runner would consume stale batch_status.json on subprocess failure. The rc guard was added in e60e3b5.

tasks.finding_summary: [RECLASSIFIED] Codex claimed wrong newline marker but code was correct at line 1829. Existing test_untracked_file_no_newline_marker confirms correct format.
tasks.current_main_status: Code was always correct. Line 1829 produces literal backslash correctly. test_untracked_file_no_newline_marker (line 4310) verifies format and runs git apply --check as authoritative test.

action.success_criteria: No action required. Finding is documented as false positive in docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md Section 11 reclassification history. task_category=false_positive_with_evidence.
action.deliverable: No file changes. The reclassification history in docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md (Section 11) serves as the evidence note.

tasks.notes: Codex finding was unfounded. test_untracked_file_no_newline_marker (tests/test_run_temp_worktree_execution.py:4310) already verifies correct format and runs git apply --check as authoritative test. No code changes needed.

tasks.finding_summary: [RECLASSIFIED] Codex misidentified cat-file usage. validate_corpus_targets uses cat-file -e correctly for file existence; resolve_base_sha uses rev-parse --verify for SHA. Both correct. Needs regression test.
tasks.current_main_status: Functions are correct. validate_corpus_targets line 171 uses cat-file -e sha:path (correct). resolve_base_sha line 112 uses rev-parse --verify SHA (correct). No bug. Needs regression test to prevent future regression.

action.success_criteria: Written audit note concluding either 'confirmed bug' or 'false positive' with evidence, filed as a comment on this task.
action.deliverable: Markdown evidence note in docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md appending to the Wave 1 section, citing the relevant resolve_base_sha and validate_corpus_targets functions.

tasks.notes: Codex misidentified cat-file usage. validate_corpus_targets uses cat-file -e sha:path correctly for file existence. resolve_base_sha uses rev-parse --verify correctly for SHA validation. No bug. Regression test needed to prevent future misuse.

tasks.finding_summary: [RECLASSIFIED] Governance gap was fixed in PR #323. Handbook line 68 now shows APPLY_TO_BRANCH_APPLIED. Audit doc line 65 corrected. No runtime impact.
tasks.current_main_status: Fixed in PR #323. docs/autocoder_engineering_handbook.md line 68 now shows APPLY_TO_BRANCH_APPLIED. docs/autocoder_architecture_audit_2026_05.md line 65 also corrected.

action.success_criteria: grep confirms APPLY_TO_BRANCH_APPLIED is present and APPLY_COMPLETE_LOCAL_BRANCH is absent in all docs. Evidence note appended to docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md.
action.deliverable: Evidence note in docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md confirming the doc fix is in place and citing the PR #323 commit.

tasks.notes: Governance gap was fixed in PR #323 (commit 03b6663). This task documents that it is resolved and was not re-broken.

tasks.finding_summary: [RECLASSIFIED] False audit claim was fixed in PR #323. Audit doc rows 18-19 corrected with accurate --enable-real-claude-executor occurrence count.
tasks.current_main_status: Fixed in PR #323. docs/autocoder_architecture_audit_2026_05.md rows 18-19 corrected with explicit note about run_temp_worktree_execution.py occurrences.

action.success_criteria: grep confirms docs/autocoder_architecture_audit_2026_05.md contains the corrected claim and the occurrence count. Evidence note appended to docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md.
action.deliverable: Evidence note in docs/codex_remediation_corpus_design.md confirming the false claim was corrected and citing the accurate flag occurrences.

tasks.notes: Governance gap was fixed in PR #323 (commit 03b6663). This task documents that the false audit claim was corrected with evidence.
